suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam DevNet 3 recovery path: launch DevNet 4 or fix sync issues
suggestions.rationale: DevNet 3 remains unstable with Lighthouse sync issues and Teku envelope problems. Decision needed on whether to abandon and move to DevNet 4 or continue debugging.

suggestions.topic: ePBS sync security implications: CL syncing without payload envelope validation
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #78 action for EL teams to analyze security of CL sync without payload envelopes remains open. ACDT #79 mentioned sync issues persist, blocking DevNet progress.

suggestions.topic: Builder deposit spam mitigation decision after signature verification benchmarks
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #79 deferred PR 5223 (8192 epoch delay) pending benchmarks from Justin Traglia to be presented at ACDC. This directly affects ePBS security.

suggestions.topic: Engine API PR 608 and consensus spec updates for gas limit coordination
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #79 decided CL validates target adherence while EL validates EIP-1559 rules. Three PRs assigned (Nico Flaig, Potuz, Bharath) need status updates.

suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-7 scope: incorporate repricing and benchmarking optimizations
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #79 mentioned bal-devnet-6 near finalization with bal-devnet-7 planned for optimizations. Final repricing EIP numbers for 7904/8038 expected this week.

suggestions.topic: Hegotá DevNet testing: FOCIL integration status
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #79 reported FOCIL DevNet achieved interop with more Hegotá testing planned. Update needed on progress and any blockers.

suggestions.topic: Batch I/O prefetch flag for BAL benchmarking
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #75 action for Nethermind/Erigon remains unconfirmed despite benchmarking discussions continuing through ACDT #79. May have been completed async without explicit call mention.

suggestions.topic: Blob Delta Serum devnet status: expand beyond Prysm/Lighthouse
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #78 reported only Prysm and Lighthouse deployed with partial cells. Informational update on whether other clients have joined or timeline for expansion.
